Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Li clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Li clan has not made any motion to improve its strength before the Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 7''' — The Li clan's color in the arena is green and gray.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — The Li clan has experts and a Grand Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — The Li Clan is led by Grand Patriarch Li Markuth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Grand Patriarch of the Li Clan summoned dark clouds.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Li clan is a group Lindon needs to visit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Li clan is located to the south of the valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Li clan is surrounded by a wall of smooth, pale, polished wood decorated with functional script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — The Li clan is led by a Matriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — The Li clan participated in the Seven-Year Festival.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Li clan has a Fourth Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — The Li clan has wooden walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Li clan was not as bad as Lindon had said.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — A man from the Li clan collapsed with blood running from his eyes.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Jaran has an acid burn from the Li clan.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Li clan has a Grand Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth is the Grand Elder of the Li clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Li clan has Elders.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — The Li clan is no longer among the top ten families in Sacred Valley.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
